army_special_rules.name: Harmonic Resonance
army_special_rules.text: At the start of every Game Turn roll a D6 for each enemy unit on the table that does not have the Fearless special rule. On a 5+, that unit immediately receives a Pin Marker.

army_special_rules.name: Za Stalina
army_special_rules.text: Whenever a Soviet Bloc Infantry or Artillery unit fails a Morale Check and would be destroyed as a result, re-roll it and apply the second result instead. If a test is passed in this way, that unit is immediately up-rated to the next Quality level for the rest of the game. If the unit was already Veteran, it gains +1 Morale Value instead.

army_special_rules.name: Heroes of the Soviet Bloc
army_special_rules.text: At the start of the game, before deployment, one non-Hero, non-Rift Infantry unit in a Soviet Bloc force may be designated 'Heroes of the Soviet Bloc'. The chosen unit immediately gains a point of Guts – any model in the unit may spend it as if they were a Hero. Furthermore, friendly units within 6" of the Heroes of the Soviet Bloc unit gain the Fanatics special rule.

army_special_rules.name: Stolen Rift-Tech
army_special_rules.text: Once per Game, when a Soviet Bloc Rift Die is drawn randomly from the Dice Bag, rolled and assigned to a Soviet Bloc Rift unit, its owning player may swap the result with that of another Rift Die assigned to another unit within 6", friend or foe. For example, if it rolled an Exhausted result and an enemy unit within 6" had an Active Rift Die, you may change the Soviet Rift Die to Active and the enemy's Rift Die to Exhausted.

units.name: Commissar Gregor Drugov
units.unit_type: Hero (May be used as a Company Commander) 160

weapons: Drugov – Assault Rifle, Teeth and Claws (+2 Pen at Close Quarters)
Ursus Bodyguards – Teeth and Claws (+2 Pen at Close Quarters)

rules.name: Not One Step Back!
rules.text: When a friendly Infantry unit fails an Order Test within 6" of Drugov, remove one model from the unit and re-roll the test.

rift.enhancement: Ursine Fury. When issued a Run Order Drugov can opt to enter an Ursine Fury. Drugov and his Ursus bodyguards gain the Fast special rule and increase their Teeth and Claws bonus to +3 Pen at Close Quarters for the remainder of the Game Turn. If Drugov uses Ursine Fury exhaust one of his Rift Dice after he has executed his Order.
rift.exhausted: Gain Lumbering special rule – Reduced to a movement rate of 4" on an Advance Order and 8" on a Run Order.

units.name: Company Commander - Officer In Guards MK II Armour
units.composition: 1 Officer in Grade 1 Heavy Powered Armour Regular: 69

units.name: Platoon Commander - Officer In Guards MK II Armour
units.composition: 1 Officer in Grade 1 Heavy Powered Armour Regular: 39

rules.name: Commissar
rules.text: A Soviet Bloc force can include a single Commissar, not part of any Platoon Selector, in the same way as a Company Commander.

rules.name: Not One Step Back!
rules.text: When a friendly Infantry unit fails an Order Test within 6" of a Commissar, remove one model from the unit and re-roll the test.

units.name: Guards MK I Armoured Infantry
units.composition: 1 NCO and 4 Soldiers in Grade 1 Heavy Powered Armour REQUISITION POINTS

options.desc: Additional Soldiers in Guards Mk I

rules.name: Lumbering
rules.text: Guards Mk I Armoured Infantry have a movement rate of 4" on an Advance Order and 8" on a Run Order.

units.name: Guards MK II Armoured Infantry
units.composition: 1 NCO and 4 Soldiers in Grade 1 Heavy Powered Armour REQUISITION POINTS

options.desc: Additional Soldiers in Guards Mk II

units.name: Moroz Gul
units.composition: 1 NCO and 4 Moroz Gul REQUISITION POINTS

rules.name: Frozen Meat
rules.text: Moroz Gul are immune to damage and Pinning effects from Flamethrowers.

rift.enhancement: Killing Mist. When issued an Order a Moroz Gul Squad can opt to create an icy mist around themselves for the remainder of the Game Turn. This confers the Moroz Gul Squad Light Cover that moves with the unit. Killing Mist negates any Defensive Position bonus if the Moroz Gul Squad assaults in the same turn. If assaulting models in Open Ground the Moroz Gul Squad resolves their damage and casualties are removed before the enemy has a chance to retaliate. If a Moroz Gul squad uses Killing Mist exhaust its Rift Die after it has executed its Order.
rift.exhausted: May not be issued Run Orders.

weapons: Teeth and Claws (+2 Pen at Close Quarters)

rift.enhancement: Ursine Fury. When issued a Run Order Ursus Infantry can opt to enter an Ursine Fury. The unit gains the Fast special rule and each model increases its Teeth and Claws bonus to +3 Pen at Close Quarters for the remainder of the Game Turn. If this Enhancement is used exhaust the unit’s Rift Die after it has executed its Order.
rift.exhausted: Gain Lumbering special rule – Reduced to a movement rate of 4" on an Advance Order and 8" on a Run Order.

units.name: Daughters Of The Motherland
units.composition: 1 NCO and 4 Daughters of the Motherland REQUISITION POINTS

options.desc: Replace Assault Rifle with Zvukovoy Avtomat

rift.enhancement: Rallying Cry. Before rolling for an Order Test Daughters of the Motherland can opt to exhaust their Rift Die to remove D3 Pin Markers from their own unit and all friendly units within 6". Roll the D3 separately for each affected unit. If this results in the Daughters of the Motherland squad removing all their Pin Markers then the Order Test is passed automatically, unless the Order Test would be mandatory even without Pin Markers (e.g. Tank Fear). If this Enhancement is used, exhaust one of the Daughters of the Motherland’s Rift Dice after it has completed its Order.
rift.surging: Gain Hard to Kill special rule.

options.desc: Replace the Team Leader’s Rifle with an Anti-tank Rifle
Replace the Assistant's Pistol with a Rifle
Replace the Assistant's Pistol with an SMG
Replace the Assistant's Pistol with an Assault Rifle

weapons: 1x Zvukovoy Proeyektor – Counts as Heavy Artillery for the purposes of being moved by its crew

options.desc: Replace Forward-facing Light Automatic Cannon with Light Anti-tank Gun

weapons: 1 x Turret-mounted HMG covering the front and left arcs
1 x Turret-mounted HMG covering the rear and right arcs
1 x Turret-mounted Super-heavy Anti-tank Gun and Co-axial MMG

rules.name: Emplacement
rules.text: The Zvukovoy Proeyektor Emplacement starts the game with an Immobilised result. In scenarios that do not normally allow units to start on the table, place this unit within 6” of your DZE.

options.desc: Add a Pintle-mounted MMG covering the right and rear arcs
Add a Pintle-mounted MMG covering the left and rear arcs
